description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a light wood finish and a minimalist design. The front features four distinct sections: the upper half has two large doors with dark glass or opaque panels divided by a cross, while the lower half consists of three solid wood drawers. The sides and top are finished in a consistent light wood grain, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The handles are subtle vertical grooves integrated into the door and drawer fronts, maintaining a sleek look. The wardrobe stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood with possible glass or acrylic inserts on the upper doors.
description: A tall, light wood wardrobe with dark glass-paneled upper doors and three lower drawers, featuring integrated vertical groove handles. The design is modern and minimalist with a clean, rectangular shape.
description_view_0: The wardrobe is seen from the back, showing a plain, flat light wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the wardrobe's depth and the continuous light wood grain pattern, with no visible handles or panels.
description_view_2: The front view displays the wardrobe's main features: two upper doors with dark glass panels divided by a cross, and three lower drawers, all with integrated vertical groove handles.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the same light wood grain and flat surface.
